sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62496" key="leptoka/lamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεπτο-κάλᾰμος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n62496.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with fine stalks</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:[8:9:2]" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">[8.9.2]</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
